lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: Can I help you [TzHaar caste]-[player name]?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: That what you are... you tough and strong no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: That what you are... you user of mystic powers no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: That what you are... you agile and quick no?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: That what you are... you skilled at making things no?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes I suppose I am...

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: Silly JalYt, I am TzHaar-Hur, one of the crafters for this city.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: There are the wise TzHaar-Mej who guide us, the mighty TzHaar-Ket who guard us, and the swift TzHaar-Xil who hunt for our food.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Hur-Zal
lines.text: What ever you say, crazy JalYt!
